  (:objects
    r1 - room
    b1 b2 ... b12 - ball
    g1 g2 ... g8 - gripper
  )

  (:init
    (room r1)
    (ball b1) (ball b2) ... (ball b12)
    (gripper g1) (gripper g2) ... (gripper g8)
    (at-robby r1)
    (at b1 r1) (at b2 r1) ... (at b4 r1)
    (carry b1 g1) (carry b2 g2) ... (carry b4 g4)
    (free g5) (free g6) ... (free g8)
  )

  (:goal
    (and
      (= 0 (count ?b (at ?b r1)))
      (forall (?g ?i)
        (implies (and (gripper ?g) (= ?i (mod (index ?b b1) 4)))
          (carry ?b ?g)))
    )
  )

  (:metric minimize (count ?b (at ?b r1)))
)

    (carry b1 g1) (carry b2 g2) ... (carry b5 g5)
    (free g1) (free g2) ... (free g6)
  )

          (carry ?b ?g)))
    )
  )

  (:metric minimize (count ?b (at ?b r1)))
)

(define (problem juggling)
  (:domain gripper)

  (:objects
    r1 - room
    b1 b2 ... b11 - ball
    g1 g2 ... g8 - gripper
  )

  (:init
    (room r1)
    (ball b1) (ball b2) ... (ball b11)
    (gripper g1) (gripper g2) ... (gripper g8)
    (at-robby r1)
    (at b1 r1) (at b2 r1) ... (at b6 r1)
    (carry b1 g1) (carry b2 g2) ... (carry b6 g6)
    (free g7) (free g8)
  )

  (:goal
    (and (carry b1 g2) (carry b2 g3) ... (carry b5 g7)
      (not (at-robby r1))
      (forall (?b ?g)
        (implies (and (ball ?b) (gripper ?g) (carry ?b ?g))
          (=t (at ?b r1)))))
  )
